name: Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup whole wheat flour (ww pastry flour will work)
2 cups frozen corn (canned would probably work)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine water, honey, and 1 cup of the cornmeal. Blend until liquified.
2. In a bowl, combine dry ingredients (cornmeal, baking powder, salt) and mix together.
3. Pour in blended liquid and mix thoroughly.
4. Mix in last cup of cornmeal.
5. Spritz a 9-inch round glass pan with oil spray and sprinkle with cornmeal.
6. Pour batter into pan and place in oven preheated to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 30 minutes, or until done. If using a pre-heated oven, you may need to shorten the baking time.
8. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
